nodes.name: GET FortiGate Logs
nodes.notes: FortiOS REST API - Obtiene logs de IPS, antivirus, web filter. Ajustar logids según políticas activas.

nodes.name: GET FortiGate IPS Logs
nodes.notes: FortiOS UTM IPS endpoint. Requiere vdom=root y reutiliza la misma API key.

nodes.name: GET FortiGate Antivirus Logs
nodes.notes: FortiOS UTM Antivirus endpoint. Requiere vdom=root y reutiliza la misma API key.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ size: 100, sort: [{ timestamp: { order: 'desc' } }], query: { bool: { must: [{ range: { 'rule.level': { gte: 7 } } }, { range: { timestamp: { gte: 'now-15m' } } }] } } }) }}

nodes.name: GET Wazuh Alerts
nodes.notes: Wazuh v4 usa el Indexer API (OpenSearch) para alertas historicas. Requiere WAZUH_INDEXER_URL y WAZUH_INDEXER_BASIC_AUTH.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ DetectorId: $env.GUARDDUTY_DETECTOR_ID, FindingCriteria: { Criterion: { 'severity': { Gte: 4 }, 'updatedAt': { GreaterThanOrEqual: Date.now() - 300000 } } }, MaxResults: 50 }) }}

nodes.name: GET GuardDuty Findings
nodes.notes: Usa AWS SDK auth. Alternativa: usar nodo AWS Lambda que invoque GetFindings

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ jsonrpc: '2.0', method: 'trigger.get', params: { output: 'extend', selectHosts: ['host'], filter: { value: 1 }, sortfield: 'lastchange', sortorder: 'DESC', limit: 50, min_severity: 3 }, id: 1 }) }}

nodes.name: Merge All Sources
nodes.notes: Merge mode: Append. Todas las fuentes convergen aquí.

nodes.name: IoC Normalizer & Scorer
nodes.notes: Normaliza, deduplica, y calcula threat score. Código en scripts/ioc_normalizer.js

parameters.query: INSERT INTO workflow_runs (workflow_name, status, events_ingested, iocs_created, alerts_sent, finished_at) VALUES ('threat-intel-main', 'success', {{ $json._stats.ingested }}, {{ $json._stats.created }}, {{ $json._stats.alerted }}, NOW())
